business.name: Beaver Plumbing and Electric
business.tagline: When it breaks, we fix it right

hero.headline: Middle of the night? *We answer.*
hero.subheadline: 297 five-star reviews from Columbia neighbors who know — when pipes burst or power fails, one call fixes everything.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Pipes, Pumps & Power
services_section.subheading: Everything that flows or glows in your Columbia home

services.title: Water Heater Installation
services.description: New unit picked up, old one hauled off, everything handled seamlessly. No stress, no surprises — just hot water when you turn the handle.

services.title: Emergency Plumbing
services.description: Burst pipes at 2am? Lost water pressure? We triage over the phone, then show up fast to get your Columbia home flowing again.

services.title: Well Pump Repair
services.description: When your well pump quits, we diagnose the problem in hours, not days. Eddie and Scotty make it like the problem never happened.

services.title: Electrical Services
services.description: From outlets to panels, we handle the power side too. One crew, two specialties — because problems don't stay in their lane.

about.heading: Columbia's Go-To for Plumbing & Electric
about.body: We're the crew Columbia calls when things go wrong. Stephen, Eddie, Scotty, and Steve — we've been fixing what breaks in Midlands homes, one emergency at a time. Whether it's a midnight pipe burst or a water heater that picked the worst day to quit, we show up ready to work.

reviews.name: Daniel G.
reviews.text: Water heater installation was top-notch from start to finish. Couldn't be more impressed with their service.

reviews.name: Jazmon K.
reviews.text: Plumbing emergency in the middle of the night. Steve immediately began messaging to triage and showed up promptly the next morning.

reviews.name: D D.
reviews.text: Absolutely fantastic! They picked up my new water heater, hauled off the old one, and handled everything seamlessly.

reviews.name: Drew W.
reviews.text: Lost water pressure in our new home. Eddie and Scotty came out within an hour, diagnosed the well pump problem, and fixed it fast.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Where We Work
service_areas.subheading: Serving Columbia and the greater Midlands area

cta.heading: Ready to Fix What's Broken?
cta.body: Don't let plumbing or electrical problems ruin your day. Call the crew Columbia trusts to get it done right.
